executions_recent.summary: Closed BTC long after target hit.

deployment_incident.title: Railway production import failure
deployment_incident.summary: The production backend crashed during startup because /app/main.py imports mvp.scripts.process_control.CONTROLLER, but the deployed package does not contain mvp.scripts.process_control.
deployment_incident.impact: Live backend reads and process-control actions may be unavailable from the static GitHub dashboard until the backend image includes the missing module or guards the optional import.
next_actions: Redeploy the backend with mvp/scripts/process_control.py included in the package or Docker context.
If process control is optional in Railway, guard the import and expose read-only health/state endpoints without CONTROLLER.
Use this GitHub Pages deployment as a static informational fallback while Railway production is crashed.
